description: OTSKP cost catalogue — 2026 SFDI open format (17 940 items). Legacy 2025_03_otskp.xml (17 940) retained only as a test fixture.
notes: Primary OTSKP catalogue for Workflow A enrichment (Task H). Prod otskp.db is built from the GCS SFDI file by scripts/ingest_otskp_catalog.py; the committed 2026_otskp.xml is the in-memory / code_detector fallback.
